shared_files.note: Testing-only iteration — no source code modifications

testing_plan.regression_reason: Risk score 4 from iteration 90 (40 API route files touched with logActivity integration). Last 3 iterations (88-90) were build-only with no testing. SIGNAL directive: FEAT-049 acceptance + regression.

checks: Migration 017 schema: activity_log table with correct columns (id, workspace_id, user_id, action enum, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, details JSONB, created_at)
activity_action enum includes: created, updated, deleted, completed, assigned, commented, exported, shared
RLS policies: SELECT + INSERT only via can_access_workspace(), no UPDATE/DELETE
Index on (workspace_id, created_at DESC) for efficient pagination
ActivityLog type in database.ts matches migration schema
API route GET /api/v1/activity: workspace_id required, supports user_id/action/entity_type/from/to/limit/offset filters
API route returns paginated results with correct envelope format
logActivity() utility in lib/api/activity.ts: fire-and-forget pattern (no await, catches errors silently)
logActivity() accepts workspace_id, user_id, action, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, optional details
Activity page UI at /w/[workspaceId]/activity: page.tsx server component + activity-view.tsx client component
Activity view: chronological feed with action type filter tabs
Activity view: entity links, relative timestamps, Load More pagination
Sidebar nav includes Activity item with correct icon and path
workspace-shell.tsx reserved paths includes 'activity'
logActivity() integrated in POST handlers (spot-check: workspaces, steps, sections, connections, comments, tasks, runbooks)
logActivity() integrated in PATCH handlers (spot-check: workspaces, steps, sections, runbooks, runbook-steps)
logActivity() integrated in DELETE handlers (spot-check: workspaces, steps, sections, connections, comments, tasks)
Special actions: comments POST uses 'commented', runbooks PATCH to completed uses 'completed', shares POST uses 'shared'
Entities without direct workspace_id (roles, people, step-roles, annotations, runbook-steps) use async IIFE for parent chain traversal
Client wrapper fetchActivityLog() in lib/api/client.ts with correct typing

suites_to_run.description: Full regression — all phases through Phase 4 FEAT-049
checks: /login renders (200)
/workspaces redirects unauthed (307→login)
Canvas tab loads with nodes (static analysis)
Step detail panel opens on node click
Journey canvas renders with stages/touchpoints
Gap analysis view renders
Comparison view renders
Dashboard page renders
Teams/People/Tools pages render with search/filter
Comments system: panel, badges, workspace view, category filter
Tasks system: panel, badges, section rollup
Runbooks: list view, detail view, 4-state step status, Complete/Cancel dialogs
Playbook mode: step-by-step execution, Skip button, progress bar, dot navigation
Activity page: renders with filter tabs and pagination
Type check passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
No new TypeScript errors introduced
API auth guards return 401 for unauthenticated requests

warnings_added: Accessibility cadence severely overdue — last audit iteration 21, now iteration 91 (70 iterations). Schedule accessibility audit for iteration 92 or 93.
